chapter_title: About the Forbiddance of hurting the

hadith_entries.text:
888. Narrated Abu-Zarr; 'The Prophet said: "There are
three men whom Allah does not look at or purify them and
they will receive a severe torment." We said; 'Who are these,
O Messenger of Allah! They have been lost and ruined?'
Riyadhos-Saliheen (The Meadows of the Righteous)
He said: "The one who mentions his good deeds to others
boastfully (or the one who takes more that what he gives),
the one who hangs down his garment below his heels
(out of pride), and the one who promotes his merchandise by
false oaths."
